fixture_note: PLACEHOLDER fixture pinned at S22-N4 ship-time. Operator overwrites with the real recorded response by running `pytest -m live_paysh -k agentmail`. Until then the contract test exercises the chunking + ledger path against this synthetic body.

body.narrative: AgentMail provisioned a dedicated inbox address backed by an x402-priced inbound + outbound gateway. For neobank KYC flows the recommended integration is to spin a fresh inbox per customer-onboarding session, route the verification email through it, and tear the inbox down once the verification token has been claimed.
